title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
summary: Nuclear startup X-Energy announced plans to pursue an IPO seeking up to $800 million in funding. This signals growing investor appetite for advanced nuclear energy solutions as an alternative power source.
content: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

zh.title: 亚马逊投资的 X-Energy 公司申请 IPO 融资 8 亿美元
zh.summary: 核能初创公司 X-Energy 宣布计划启动 IPO，寻求高达 8 亿美元的融资。这表明投资者对先进核能解决方案作为替代电源的兴趣与日俱增。

title: Florida surgeon charged with killing man after removing liver instead of spleen
summary: A Florida surgeon has been charged in connection with a patient's death after surgically removing the wrong organ. The incident represents a serious medical error and not the first time this surgeon has made such a mistake.
content: It wasn't the first time the surgeon cut out the wrong organ.

zh.title: 佛罗里达州外科医生因误切肝脏而非脾脏导致患者身亡被控
zh.summary: 一名佛罗里达州外科医生因手术切除错误器官导致患者死亡而被起诉。这起事件代表了一次严重的医疗失误，也不是该外科医生第一次犯此类错误。

title: YouTube now lets you turn off Shorts
summary: YouTube has added a zero-minute timer option for Shorts, allowing users to completely disable the feature on mobile devices. The update expands previous parental controls and gives all users more granular control over their screen time.
content:
YouTube's time management settings now have an option to put a zero-minute time limit on Shorts, effectively removing them from your app in Android and iOS. The option is an update to the Shorts timer YouTube originally announced in October; the lowest previous option was 15 minutes. 
The feature was expanded in January to give parents some control over how long their kids spend scrolling through Shorts, with an option for zero minutes "coming soon." According to YouTube spokesperson Makenzie Spiller, the option to set the timer to zero is now "live for all parents, and is currently being rolled out to everyone," including users with regula …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube 现在允许用户关闭 Shorts
zh.summary: YouTube 为 Shorts 添加了零分钟计时器选项，允许用户在移动设备上完全禁用该功能。此更新扩展了之前的家长控制，并为所有用户提供了对屏幕时间的更精细控制。

title: Jury finds Live Nation/Ticketmaster is illegal monopoly that overcharged fans
summary: A federal jury determined that Live Nation/Ticketmaster operates as an illegal monopoly and has overcharged consumers. The verdict, reached despite the Trump administration dropping out of the case, was pursued by 33 states.
content: Trump administration dropped out of the trial, but 33 states kept fighting.

zh.title: 陪审团裁定Live Nation/Ticketmaster构成非法垄断并超额收费消费者
zh.summary: 联邦陪审团判定Live Nation/Ticketmaster构成非法垄断并对消费者进行了超额收费。尽管特朗普政府退出了此案，但由33个州推进的判决仍然成立。

title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
summary: Doug Field, Ford's EV and technology chief, is departing the company after leading its ambitious electric vehicle strategy. Field previously held executive roles at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.
content: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

zh.title: 福特电动汽车及技术主管离职
zh.summary: 福特电动汽车和技术主管道格·菲尔德在领导该公司雄心勃勃的电动汽车战略后离职。菲尔德曾在苹果和特斯拉担任过行政职位，于2021年加入福特。

title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
summary: Despite a federal jury finding Live Nation an illegal monopoly, the company's recent DOJ settlement raises questions about whether a breakup will actually occur. The verdict leaves the outcome uncertain despite the significant legal finding.
content: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.

zh.title: 等等，他们真的还能拆分Live Nation吗？
zh.summary: 尽管联邦陪审团认定Live Nation构成非法垄断，但该公司最近与司法部的和解协议引发了关于是否会真正进行拆分的疑问。尽管有重大的法律判决，判决结果仍不确定。

title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
summary: Monarch Tractor, facing mounting operational challenges, has been acquired by Caterpillar in a deal that ends the startup's independent operations. The company had struggled with technical issues and dealer complaints about its autonomous technology.
content: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

zh.title: 卡特彼勒收购君主拖拉机，结束其独立运营
zh.summary: 面临运营困难的Monarch Tractor已被卡特彼勒收购，结束了该初创公司的独立运营。该公司一直在努力解决技术问题和经销商对其自主技术的投诉。

title: "TotalRecall Reloaded" tool finds a side entrance to Windows 11's Recall database
summary: A security tool has identified a vulnerability in Windows 11's Recall feature that bypasses its encryption protections. The discovery highlights potential security gaps in Microsoft's new AI-powered recall system.
content: "The vault is solid. The delivery truck is not."

zh.title: "TotalRecall Reloaded"工具发现Windows 11 Recall数据库的安全漏洞
zh.summary: 一个安全工具发现了Windows 11 Recall功能中的漏洞，可以绕过其加密保护。这一发现突显了微软新推出的AI驱动回忆系统中的潜在安全隐患。

title: Ford’s EV and software chief Doug Field is leaving the company
summary: Doug Field is stepping down from his role leading Ford's electric vehicle and software initiatives, with Alan Clarke from the company's California lab taking over his responsibilities. The leadership change comes months after Ford announced a $19.5 billion writedown on its EV strategy.
content:
Ford is shaking things up as it relates to its EV and software teams. Doug Field, who left Apple five years ago to helm Ford's multibillion-dollar bet on electric vehicles and software, is stepping down next month. Getting a promotion will be Alan Clarke, the ex-Tesla engineer who now leads Ford's California-based skunkworks lab. Clarke's new title will be vice president of advanced development projects, and he will continue to helm the effort to develop Ford's Universal Electric Vehicle (UEV) Platform.
The shake-up comes less five months after Ford announced a massive $19.5 billion writedown on its EV investment, as well as the discontinua …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 福特电动汽车和软件主管Doug Field离职
zh.summary: Doug Field正在从领导福特电动汽车和软件倡议的职位上退下来，来自该公司加州实验室的Alan Clarke将接任他的职责。这一管理层变化发生在福特宣布其电动汽车战略出现195亿美元减值后数月。

title: Trump’s posting even more AI-generated Trump-Jesus fan art
summary: Donald Trump continues to share AI-generated religious imagery depicting himself on Truth Social, sparking debate about celebrity AI art and religious symbolism. The posts are part of broader discussions about AI-generated content in political contexts.
content:
The version posted by @realdonaldtrump/Truth Social.	

Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about Big Tech power plays in Washington and beyond. (And when I say beyond, I mean the great beyond, like Heaven, maybe.) If you've found your way to this newsletter from the wild, annual subscriptions are currently 50 percent off. That's $30 a year for access to an entire newsroom full of reporting about technology and how it's eating society alive - not just in politics!
(I will also accept confidential tips at tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com.)
You can't spell "antichrist" without "AI"
Of all the things that would have fractured the religious right's alliance with Donald Tr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普发布更多AI生成的特朗普-耶稣粉丝艺术作品
zh.summary: 唐纳德·特朗普继续在Truth Social上分享描绘自己的AI生成宗教图像，引发了关于名人AI艺术和宗教象征意义的辩论。这些帖子是关于AI生成内容在政治背景下应用的更广泛讨论的一部分。

title: Google releases new apps for Windows and MacOS
summary: Google has launched new desktop applications for Windows and macOS, expanding beyond its traditional web-based product focus. The move represents the company's effort to provide native applications for desktop platforms.
content: Google mostly creates products for the web, but it has some new desktop apps today.

zh.title: 谷歌发布Windows和MacOS新应用
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了针对Windows和macOS的新桌面应用程序，超越了其传统的基于网络的产品焦点。这一举措代表了该公司提供桌面平台原生应用程序的努力。

title: Boston Dynamics’ robot dog now reads gauges and thermometers with Google's AI
summary: Boston Dynamics' Spot robot can now automatically read industrial gauges and thermometers using Google's AI technology. The capability enables more autonomous inspections of industrial facilities without human assistance.
content: Google's AI enables robots to read gauges while inspecting industrial facilities.

zh.title: 波士顿动力公司的机器狗现在可以用谷歌AI读取仪表和温度计
zh.summary: 波士顿动力公司的Spot机器人现在可以使用谷歌AI技术自动读取工业仪表和温度计。这一功能使得工业设施的自主检查无需人工协助。

title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
summary: OpenAI has enhanced its agent-building toolkit with new capabilities focused on safety and performance as agentic AI gains enterprise adoption. The updates aim to help organizations develop more reliable autonomous AI systems.
content: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

zh.title: OpenAI更新代理SDK，帮助企业构建更安全、更强大的代理
zh.summary: 随着代理AI在企业中的应用日益增加，OpenAI增强了其代理构建工具包，新功能重点关注安全性和性能。这些更新旨在帮助组织开发更可靠的自主AI系统。

title: Prime Video shows “technical difficulties” sign instead of NBA game in overtime
summary: Prime Video experienced a technical outage during an NBA overtime game, displaying an error message instead of the broadcast. The incident drew attention from players including LeBron James.
content: "Am I trippin??" asks LeBron James.

zh.title: Prime Video在NBA加时赛中显示"技术困难"标志而非比赛直播
zh.summary: Prime Video在NBA加时赛期间遭遇技术故障，显示错误消息而不是直播内容。这一事件引起了包括勒布朗·詹姆斯在内的球员的关注。

title: Ticketmaster is an illegal monopoly, jury finds
summary: A Manhattan jury determined that Live Nation-Ticketmaster illegally monopolizes the live event ticketing market and related services. The verdict found the company liable on three counts and potentially opens the door to a forced breakup.
content:
Live Nation-Ticketmaster is an illegal monopolist, a Manhattan jury found, according to Bloomberg. The jury found the company liable on three counts: illegally monopolizing the market for live event ticketing, amphitheaters, and tying its concert promotions business with the use of its venues, Bloomberg reported.
The verdict, reached after several days of deliberation, leaves the live entertainment giant open to a potential breakup - which was the stated goal of the lawsuit back when it was filed by the Biden administration's Department of Justice. Such an outcome would go far beyond the settlement that the Trump administration's DOJ reache …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 陪审团裁定Ticketmaster构成非法垄断
zh.summary: 曼哈顿陪审团认定Live Nation-Ticketmaster非法垄断现场活动票务市场及相关服务。该判决在三项指控上裁定该公司有责任，可能为强制分拆打开大门。

title: FTC pushes ad agencies into dropping brand safety rules
summary: The FTC and eight states are settling an antitrust case against major ad agencies for coordinating brand safety rules that effectively blacklisted platforms like X based on political viewpoints. This effort involved groups like GARM, which the FTC claims violated competition law by creating collective standards that disadvantaged certain sites.
content:
FTC seal. | Image: The Verge	

The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and a group of eight states have announced a proposed settlement with big ad agencies that will prevent them from working together to avoid certain platforms like X based on their political viewpoints. 
In a complaint, the FTC argues that ad agencies violated antitrust rules by agreeing to a common set of brand safety rules, which would disfavor sites and services deemed to contain content like misinformation. That includes establishing groups like the World Federation of Advertisers' now-defunct Global Alliance for Responsible Media (GARM) to coordinate collective brand safety efforts. 
GARM was named as …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FTC推动广告公司放弃品牌安全规则
zh.summary: FTC和八个州正在解决针对主要广告公司的反垄断案件，这些公司协调品牌安全规则，实际上基于政治观点将X等平台列入黑名单。此案涉及GARM等组织，FTC声称其通过创建集体标准来制造竞争优势，违反了竞争法。

title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
summary: Hightouch, a marketing platform startup, has achieved $100M annual recurring revenue after growing $70M ARR in just 20 months by launching AI-powered agent tools for marketers. The rapid growth demonstrates strong market demand for AI-enhanced marketing automation.
content: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

zh.title: Hightouch通过AI驱动营销工具达到1亿美元年经常性收入
zh.summary: 营销平台初创公司Hightouch通过推出面向营销人员的AI驱动代理工具，在短短20个月内实现了从7000万美元年经常性收入到1亿美元的增长。这种快速增长表明市场对AI增强营销自动化的强劲需求。

title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
summary: LinkedIn data reveals hiring is down 20% since 2022, but the platform attributes the decline to higher interest rates rather than AI displacement. The data suggests macroeconomic factors, not automation, are driving the hiring slowdown.
content: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

zh.title: LinkedIn数据显示AI还不是招聘下降的原因...至少目前不是
zh.summary: LinkedIn数据显示自2022年以来招聘下降了20%，但该平台将这种下降归咎于更高的利率而非AI替代。数据表明宏观经济因素而非自动化才是推动招聘放缓的主要原因。

title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
summary: The U.S. Energy Information Agency announced it will require data centers to disclose their energy consumption details for the first time. This regulatory move aims to better track and understand the power demands of the expanding data center industry.
content: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

zh.title: 联邦政府将要求数据中心公开电费账单
zh.summary: 美国能源信息署宣布将首次要求数据中心披露其能耗详情。这一监管举措旨在更好地追踪和了解不断扩展的数据中心行业的电力需求。

title: New teaser gives us first look at Godzilla Minus Zero
summary: Director Takashi Yamazaki revealed at CinemaCon that the upcoming Godzilla Minus One sequel will be the first Japanese film shot specifically for IMAX format. The announcement marks a significant production milestone for the franchise's expansion into premium cinema.
content: Director Takashi Yamazaki told Cinemacon attendees that sequel is first Japanese film shot for IMAX.

zh.title: 新预告片首次亮相《哥斯拉零》
zh.summary: 导演山崎贵在CinemaCon上透露，即将上映的《哥斯拉负一》续集将是第一部专为IMAX格式拍摄的日本电影。这一宣布标志着该系列在高端电影院扩展中的重要里程碑。

title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered language learning platform, has surpassed 13 million users and secured $22 million in Series A funding to expand its offerings. The strong user base and investment reflect growing demand for AI-enhanced educational tools.
content: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

zh.title: AI学习应用Gizmo升级至1300万用户和2200万美元投资
zh.summary: 基于人工智能的语言学习平台Gizmo已超过1300万用户，并获得2200万美元的A轮融资以扩展其服务。强大的用户基数和投资反映了对人工智能增强教育工具的日益增长的需求。

title: Vulcan woes will "absolutely" be a factor in Pentagon's next rocket competition
summary: Pentagon officials indicated that technical issues with Vulcan rockets will significantly influence the selection process for the next military rocket program. The statement suggests that spacecraft readiness could become a decisive factor in future defense contracting decisions.
content: "If the spacecraft is ready to go, that's going to give it a priority."

zh.title: 武神火箭问题将"绝对"成为五角大楼下一次火箭竞争的因素
zh.summary: 五角大楼官员表示，武神火箭的技术问题将显著影响下一个军事火箭项目的选择过程。该声明表明航天器的准备就绪程度可能成为未来国防承包决策的决定性因素。

title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
summary: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, is launching an AI system to evaluate journalism quality and let users pay to challenge published stories. Critics argue the platform could discourage whistleblowers and fundamentally alter media accountability by commodifying story verification.
content: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

zh.title: AI能评判新闻业吗？一家Thiel支持的初创公司说可以，尽管这可能会吓阻举报人
zh.summary: Objection是一家Thiel支持的初创公司，正在推出一个AI系统来评估新闻质量，并让用户为质疑已发布故事而付费。批评人士认为，该平台可能会吓阻举报人，并通过将故事验证商业化来根本改变媒体问责制。

title: Ikea’s smart donut lamp is a sweet treat
summary: Ikea's Varmblixt lamp, already popular for its distinctive donut shape, now features smart home capabilities including color-changing, dimming, and connectivity options. The updated lamp works well as both a decorative and functional bedside light with flexible placement.
content:
The Varmblixt is a smart donut-shaped light fixture that can sit on a table or be mounted on a wall.﻿ | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Ikea's popular Varmblixt lamp just got a smart home glow-up. The delightfully bulbous light now features color-changing, dimming, and smart home control. I tested the new smart lamp in my daughter's room and found it made a great bedside lamp and added a fun touch of ambiance to her space. While she's rarely a fan of me adding smart tech to her room, she did give this an "It's nice" accolade - high praise from my 15-year-old.
The donut lamp, as it's known for its distinctive shape resembling everyone's favorite sweet treat, can be wall-mounted or set flat on a table. It comes with a long power cable, which helps with placement, and differs  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宜家的智能甜甜圈灯是个甜蜜的好东西
zh.summary: 宜家的Varmblixt灯因其独特的甜甜圈形状而已经很受欢迎，现在具有智能家居功能，包括变色、调光和连接选项。更新后的灯既可作为装饰品，也可作为功能性床头灯，具有灵活的放置方式。

title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
summary: Google is rolling out a native Gemini app for Mac that enables users to share screen content and local files with the AI assistant for real-time help. The app allows for in-context assistance without needing to switch applications.
content: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files

zh.title: 谷歌为 Mac 推出原生 Gemini 应用
zh.summary: 谷歌正在为 Mac 推出原生 Gemini 应用，用户可以与 AI 助手共享屏幕内容和本地文件以获得实时帮助。该应用允许进行上下文辅助，无需切换应用程序。

title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
summary: Google is launching a Gemini app on Mac with a floating chat interface (Option + Space shortcut) that lets users ask questions and share window content for contextual assistance. The app requires permission to access system information before sharing screen content.
content:
Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to pull up a floating chat bubble, where you can ask Gemini questions and share your window.
Before sharing your window, you'll need to give Gemini permission to access your system's information before sharing your window. From there, the AI assistant will pull information from what you're looking at to help answer your question.
It looks a bit like Apple's upgraded version of Spotlight, which you can now use to perform actions on your device, as well  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌在 Mac 上推出 Gemini AI 应用
zh.summary: 谷歌在 Mac 上推出 Gemini 应用，具有浮动聊天界面（Option + Space 快捷键），用户可以提问并共享窗口内容以获得上下文辅助。该应用在共享屏幕内容前需要权限访问系统信息。

title: Microsoft counters the MacBook Neo with freebies for students
summary: Microsoft is launching a "Microsoft College Offer" bundling 12 months of free Microsoft 365 Premium and Xbox Game Pass Ultimate with discounted Windows 11 PCs from Asus, Dell, HP, Lenovo, and Acer. The move responds to Apple's $599 MacBook Neo by targeting student customers with bundled software incentives.
content:
Apple's $599 MacBook Neo ($499 for students) has sent shockwaves through the PC ecosystem, and now Microsoft is responding with deals targeting students in the US. A new "Microsoft College Offer" is launching today, which will see the software giant bundle 12 months of free Microsoft 365 Premium and Xbox Game Pass Ultimate with select Windows 11 PCs that have also been discounted.
Acer, Asus, Dell, HP, and Lenovo are all participating in this Microsoft College Offer, and Microsoft is even discounting some Surface devices days after hiking the prices of its Surface Pro and Surface Laptop models. Best Buy is selling a 15.3-inch Lenovo IdeaPad …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软用学生优惠对抗 MacBook Neo
zh.summary: 微软推出"微软大学生优惠"，将 12 个月免费的 Microsoft 365 Premium 和 Xbox Game Pass Ultimate 与来自华硕、戴尔、惠普、联想和宏碁的折扣 Windows 11 PC 捆绑销售。此举通过向学生客户提供的软件捆绑优惠来应对苹果 $599 MacBook Neo。

title: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
summary: The Trump FCC has granted Netgear an exemption from its ban on foreign-made routers without providing public justification for the decision. The move represents the latest in a series of exemptions to the administration's restrictive router import policy.
content: Trump FCC starts handing out exemptions to its ban on foreign-made routers.

zh.title: FCC豁免网件不受外国路由器禁令，未解释原因
zh.summary: 特朗普政府的FCC已向网件公司豁免外国制造路由器禁令，但未提供公众解释。此举代表了该政府对限制性路由器进口政策一系列豁免中的最新案例。

title: This Khosla-backed autonomous pod startup just raised $170M — now it’s aiming for more
summary: Glydways, a Khosla-backed autonomous pod delivery startup, has raised $170 million in funding and is currently negotiating to raise an additional $250 million. The company is preparing to launch three pilot programs to demonstrate its autonomous delivery technology.
content: Glydways is in talks to raise another $250 million as it prepares to launch three pilot programs.

zh.title: 这家由Khosla支持的自主无人配送创业公司刚融资1.7亿美元——现在它瞄准更多融资
zh.summary: Glydways是一家由Khosla支持的自主无人配送创业公司，已融资1.7亿美元，目前正在协商额外融资2.5亿美元。该公司正在准备启动三个试点项目，以展示其自主配送技术。

title: Accel raises $5B to back late-stage bets
summary: Venture capital firm Accel has raised $5 billion in fresh capital to invest in late-stage companies developing AI technology. This significant funding round underscores investor confidence in mature AI companies.
content: Accel announced on Tuesday that it raised $5 billion in fresh capital to back late-stage companies building AI.

zh.title: Accel融资50亿美元投资后期阶段公司
zh.summary: 风险投资公司Accel融资50亿美元，用于投资开发AI技术的后期阶段公司。这轮重大融资彰显了投资者对成熟AI公司的信心。

title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
summary: Indian AI startup Emergent has launched Wingman, a task automation tool that operates through chat interfaces on WhatsApp and Telegram. The platform enables users to manage and automate tasks across messaging platforms.
content: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

zh.title: 印度的vibe-coding创业公司Emergent进入类OpenClaw的AI代理领域
zh.summary: 印度AI创业公司Emergent推出了Wingman，这是一个通过WhatsApp和Telegram聊天界面运营的任务自动化工具。该平台使用户能够跨消息平台管理和自动化任务。

title: Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale features deals on dozens of our favorite gadgets
summary: Best Buy is running a five-day Ultimate Upgrade Sale through April 19th featuring steep discounts on 4K TVs, AirPods Pro 3 ($50 off), Google Pixel 10A, iPad Air, and other electronics. Major competitors like Amazon are matching many of the deals, offering consumers multiple shopping options.
content:
The AirPods Pro 3 are $50 off, which is one of the biggest discounts we’ve seen this year. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

If you missed out on Amazon’s recent spring sales event, Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale presents yet another opportunity to score steep discounts on some of our favorite gadgets. The five-day sale runs through April 19th and features deals on a wide range of tech, including 4K TVs, Apple gear, smartphones, smart home devices, and more.
Whether you’ve had your eye on LG’s budget-friendlier B5 OLED or Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds, several Verge favorites are either at or near their record-low price. Even products released just last month — including Google’s Pixel 10A and the new 11-inch iPad Air — are on sale, so it’s not just older devices. Best of all, competing retailers like Amazon are matching many of these prices, so you can snag the same deals no matter where you shop.
LG B5 OLED TV
LG’s B5 TV is a great way to get OLED picture quality for less. It features support for both Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos, along with a 120Hz panel and four HDMI 2.1 ports for hooking up the latest gaming consoles. It also runs LG’s webOS platform, supports Amazon Alexa, and provides easy access to a wide range of popular streaming apps.

Where to Buy:

 $1299.99 $599.99 at Best Buy (48-inch)
 $1499.99 $799.99 at Amazon (55-inch)
 $1499.99 $799.99 at Best Buy (55-inch)

AirPods Pro 3
The AirPods Pro 3 have a new design that improves their fit, superior noise cancellation, better bass, and fairly accurate heart rate sensors. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249.99 $199.99 at Best Buy
 $249 $199 at Amazon
 $249 $199.99 at Walmart

Google Pixel 10A
Google’s new Pixel 10A introduces faster wired charging, Satellite SOS, and new AI tools like Camera Coach and Auto Best Take. Otherwise, it’s basically the Pixel 9A, with the same Tensor G4 chip and a dual-camera system. Read our hands-on impressions.

Where to Buy:

 $499 $449 at Amazon

zh.title: 百思买终极升级大促销提供数十款热门电子产品优惠
zh.summary: 百思买正在进行为期五天的终极升级大促销，至4月19日截止，提供4K电视、AirPods Pro 3（优惠50美元）、Google Pixel 10A、iPad Air等电子产品的大幅折扣。亚马逊等主要竞争对手也在匹配许多交易，为消费者提供多种购物选择。

title: The Senate is voting to save free IRS Direct File today
summary: The Senate is voting on the Direct File Act to resurrect IRS Direct File, the free tax filing service terminated by the Trump administration in 2025. Senator Elizabeth Warren is seeking unanimous consent to fast-track the bill, which would restore direct government tax filing that was available in 25 states.
content:
The Senate is getting ready to vote on a bill to resurrect IRS Direct File, the free tax filing service axed by the Trump administration in 2025. On Wednesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) will seek unanimous consent to pass the Direct File Act, where it will either get fast-tracked to the House of Representatives or forced back into the standard, slow-moving lawmaking process if all 100 senators don't agree.
Launched in 2024 as a pilot program, IRS Direct File allowed Americans to file taxes directly with the government for free. It spread to 25 states before IRS Commissioner Billy Long declared it "gone" last fall. But Warren and Rep. Bra …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 参议院今日投票拯救免费的国税局直接申报服务
zh.summary: 参议院正在投票《直接申报法案》以恢复由特朗普政府在2025年终止的免费税务申报服务。参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦正在寻求一致同意以加快该法案进展，该法案将恢复之前在25个州可用的直接政府税务申报服务。

title: Adobe takes Creative Cloud into Claude Code-esque territory
summary: Adobe is moving Creative Cloud into new strategic territory with AI-integrated features comparable to Claude Code's capabilities. This shift represents a significant strategic pivot as the company expands AI functionality across its creative software suite.
content: This is a big step in a new strategic direction for Adobe.

zh.title: Adobe将Creative Cloud推向类似Claude Code的新领地
zh.summary: Adobe正在将Creative Cloud转向具有与Claude Code能力相当的AI集成功能的新战略领域。随着公司在其创意软件套件中扩展AI功能，这一转变代表了一次重大的战略转向。

title: Most people still don’t want anything to do with robotaxis
summary: Public skepticism toward autonomous vehicles remains high despite industry deployments in about a dozen cities, with poll after poll showing consumers distrust the technology. Despite companies like Waymo finding customers, broader adoption faces significant consumer resistance even as safety data suggests autonomous vehicles could be safer than human drivers.
content:
I've been reporting on self-driving cars for over a decade, and I've seen the technology go through many ups and downs, highs and lows. But one thing has remained remarkably the same over the years: the public just ain't buying it. 
Poll after poll has revealed a deep and abiding skepticism toward autonomous vehicles. People don't trust the technology, don't want to ride in cars without human drivers - even when the evidence suggests the vehicle could be much safer than a human driver. Sure, robotaxis are operating in about a dozen cities now, and companies like Waymo don't seem to have any problems finding customers. But when you expand th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 大多数人仍然不想接触机器人出租车
zh.summary: 尽管自动驾驶汽车已在约十几个城市部署，但公众对其的怀疑态度仍然很高，民调显示消费者不信任这项技术。尽管Waymo等公司找到了客户，但在安全数据表明自动驾驶汽车可能比人类驾驶员更安全的情况下，更广泛的采用仍面临重大的消费者阻力。

title: Anthropic shrugs off VC funding offers valuing it at $800B+, for now
summary: Venture capitalists are eager to invest in Anthropic at valuations exceeding $800 billion, matching or surpassing OpenAI's valuation. Anthropic has declined these funding offers for the time being.
content: VCs are frothing at the mouth to write more checks to Anthropic at a valuation that matches or beats OpenAI's.

zh.title: Anthropic暂时拒绝风投融资提议，估值超800亿美元
zh.summary: 风险投资家渴望以超过8000亿美元的估值向Anthropic投资，与OpenAI的估值相当或更高。Anthropic暂时拒绝了这些融资提议。

title: Allbirds announced a switch from shoes to AI and its stock jumped 600 percent
summary: Allbirds, the shoe company that went public in 2021 but never turned a profit, is pivoting to become NewBird AI—a GPU-as-a-Service and AI cloud solutions provider after selling its shoe business for $39 million. The company plans to raise $50 million from an unnamed investor to fund this transformation, resulting in a 600% stock jump.
content:
Allbirds had a hit a decade ago with its Wool Runner shoes, but after a $4 billion IPO in 2021, the business never turned a profit, and sales dropped nearly 50 percent between 2022 and 2025. The company recently announced it would sell off its name and assets for $39 million to American Exchange after closing the remaining stores. That shell listing, however, still has some use as the Financial Times points out, and now CEO Joe Vernachio has announced a plan to raise $50 million from an unnamed investor, which will turn NewBird AI into "a fully integrated GPU-as-a-Service (GPUaaS) and AI-native cloud solutions provider."
NewBird AI expects …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Allbirds宣布从鞋类转向AI，股价上涨600%
zh.summary: 鞋类公司Allbirds于2021年上市但从未盈利，现在正在转向成为NewBird AI——一个GPU即服务和AI云解决方案提供商，该公司已将其鞋类业务以3900万美元的价格出售。该公司计划从未公开的投资者融资5000万美元来资助这一转型，导致股价上涨600%。

title: US jobs too important to risk Chinese car imports, says Ford CEO
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley argues that US automotive jobs are critical to protect against Chinese car imports, noting that China has sufficient manufacturing capacity to flood the entire US car market. His comments underscore industry concerns about protecting domestic automotive employment.
content: China has enough spare capacity to swallow the entire US car market, says Ford's Jim Farley.

zh.title: 福特CEO：美国就业岗位太重要，不能冒中国汽车进口的风险
zh.summary: 福特首席执行官吉姆·法利辩称，美国汽车工业就业对于防范中国汽车进口至关重要，他指出中国拥有足够的制造产能可以淹没整个美国汽车市场。他的评论强调了保护国内汽车就业的行业关切。

title: Motorola sues social platforms and creators over posts, raising speech concerns in India
summary: Motorola is pursuing legal action against social media platforms and content creators in India, seeking a permanent injunction against posts it deems false or defamatory about its products, including reviews, videos, and boycott campaigns. The lawsuit raises concerns about free speech protections in India.
content: Motorola has sought a permanent injunction restraining the defendants from publishing or sharing what it describes as false or defamatory content about its products, including reviews, videos, comments, and boycott campaigns.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉起诉社交媒体平台和创作者，引发印度言论自由担忧
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉在印度对社交媒体平台和内容创作者提起诉讼，寻求对其认为虚假或诽谤其产品的帖子的永久禁令，包括评论、视频和抵制活动。该诉讼引发了对印度言论自由保护的担忧。

title: Airwallex is about to take on Stripe and the rest of the payments industry — in the physical world
summary: Airwallex, a fintech company valued at $8 billion, is launching a point-of-sale product that enables businesses to accept in-person payments across multiple countries through a single unified platform. The move positions Airwallex to compete with Stripe in the physical payments space.
content: Airwallex, valued at $8 billion, is launching a point-of-sale product that lets businesses accept in-person payments in multiple countries via a single platform.

zh.title: Airwallex即将在实体支付领域与Stripe和支付行业竞争
zh.summary: 价值80亿美元的金融科技公司Airwallex正在推出一款销售点产品，使企业能够通过单一统一平台接受跨多个国家的面对面支付。此举使Airwallex能够在实体支付领域与Stripe竞争。

title: Good Omens S3 trailer sets up a blessed conclusion
summary: Prime Video's supernatural comedy series Good Omens will conclude with a special 90-minute final episode following its third season. The extended finale format allows the show to wrap up its storylines with an expanded conclusion.
content: Prime Video's supernatural comedy will end with a special 90-minute final episode.

zh.title: 《好兆头》第三季预告片为美好结局铺路
zh.summary: Prime Video的超自然喜剧系列《好兆头》将在第三季后推出特殊的90分钟最终集结束。扩展结局形式让该剧能够以扩展结论完整地收尾。

title: Allbirds abandons clothes, pivots to "AI compute infrastructure"
summary: Shoe company Allbirds is abandoning its footwear business to pivot into AI infrastructure, a move critics compare to the 2017 "Long Island Blockchain" frenzy of desperate stock-boosting pivots. The dramatic shift raises questions about the company's viability in its new market.
content: Desperate stock-boosting move recalls 2017's "Long Island Blockchain" frenzy.

zh.title: Allbirds放弃服装业务，转向"AI计算基础设施"
zh.summary: 鞋类公司Allbirds正在放弃鞋类业务转向人工智能基础设施，批评人士将其与2017年"长岛区块链"热潮中的绝望转向进行比较。这一重大转变引发了人们对该公司在新市场中可行性的质疑。

title: New 3D map of Universe could solve dark energy mystery
summary: New cosmological mapping data could help solve the mystery of dark energy by determining whether it remains constant or varies across time and space. The analysis of this data may reveal fundamental truths about the universe's expansion.
content: Latest data must still be analyzed but could help determine if dark energy is constant or varies over time.

zh.title: 宇宙三维地图可能解开暗能量之谜
zh.summary: 新的宇宙学测绘数据可能通过确定暗能量是否保持恒定或随时间和空间变化来帮助解开暗能量之谜。对这些数据的分析可能会揭示有关宇宙膨胀的基本真理。

title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
summary: Following the sale of its shoe business, Allbirds is rebranding as NewBird AI and shifting focus to AI server infrastructure after securing $50M in convertible financing. The pivot represents a complete departure from the company's original footwear business model.
content: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

zh.title: 出售鞋业务后，Allbirds转向AI
zh.summary: 在出售其鞋业务后，Allbirds正在重新品牌化为NewBird AI，并在获得5000万美元可转换融资后转向专注于AI服务器基础设施。这一转变代表了与公司原有鞋类业务模式的完全背离。

title: Sweden blames Russian hackers for attempting ‘destructive’ cyberattack on thermal plant
summary: Sweden's civil defense minister attributed a destructive cyberattack on a thermal plant to Russian hackers, warning that such attacks are escalating against European infrastructure. The incident highlights rising tensions and increasing cyber threats targeting critical energy facilities.
content: Sweden's minister for civil defense said Russian hackers are "now attempting destructive cyber attacks against organizations in Europe."

zh.title: 瑞典指责俄罗斯黑客试图对热电厂发动"破坏性"网络攻击
zh.summary: 瑞典民防部长将一次针对热电厂的破坏性网络攻击归咎于俄罗斯黑客，警告此类攻击正在对欧洲基础设施升级。这一事件凸显了日益紧张的局势和针对关键能源设施的网络威胁不断增加。

title: What’s the deal with Alzheimer’s disease and amyloid?
summary: Scientists are reconsidering decades of research focused on amyloid as the primary cause of Alzheimer's disease, suggesting this approach may represent a scientific dead-end. The shift could redirect research toward alternative biological mechanisms.
content: For decades, scientists have concentrated on what now looks to be a blind alley.

zh.title: 阿尔茨海默病和淀粉样蛋白是怎么回事？
zh.summary: 科学家正在重新考虑数十年来关于淀粉样蛋白是阿尔茨海默病主要原因的研究，暗示这种方法可能代表一个科学死胡同。这一转变可能会将研究转向替代性的生物学机制。

title: Blue Origin has a new employee stock plan, but not everyone is happy
summary: Blue Origin introduced a new employee stock plan aimed at creating liquidity events, though the announcement has not been uniformly welcomed by employees. The plan reflects the company's effort to improve equity benefits and employee compensation.
content: "We are being intentional about creating liquidity events."

zh.title: 蓝色起源推出新员工股票计划，但反响不一
zh.summary: 蓝色起源推出了一项新的员工股票计划，旨在创造流动性事件，但该公告未得到员工的一致欢迎。该计划反映了公司改善股权福利和员工薪酬的努力。

title: It's Tax Day, and no one knows how to file for prediction market winnings
summary: US taxpayers face unclear requirements for reporting prediction market winnings on Tax Day, with no official guidance available. The regulatory gap highlights challenges in taxing emerging financial instruments and new market types.
content: It's time for Americans to pay taxes on prediction market winnings, but no one knows how.

zh.title: 报税日来临，无人知晓如何申报预测市场收益
zh.summary: 美国��税人在报税日面临预测市场收入申报要求不明确的问题，没有官方指导。监管空白凸显了对新兴金融工具和新市场类型征税所面临的挑战。

title: Fathom adds a bot-less meeting mode in a bid to take on Granola
summary: Fathom is introducing a bot-less meeting mode with video, audio-only, and transcription options to compete directly with Granola. This addresses growing privacy concerns about recording bots while maintaining the ability to capture and process meeting information.
content: Fathom will allow you to choose between video, audio-only, and transcription modes.

zh.title: Fathom推出无机器人会议模式，试图与Granola竞争
zh.summary: Fathom推出无机器人会议模式，提供视频、纯音频和转录选项，直接与Granola竞争。这解决了对录音机器人日益增长的隐私担忧，同时保持了捕获和处理会议信息的能力。

title: The new Tomodachi Life is made to be shared — even if Nintendo doesn’t want you to
summary: Nintendo's new Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream expands creative tools to generate increasingly absurd scenarios and jokes, but imposes significant restrictions on sharing creations. The tension reflects Nintendo's cautious approach to user-generated content despite enabling the creativity that drives the game's appeal.
content:
Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream is hard to explain. The best way to understand is to see it in action; a screenshot of Handsome Squidward and Bob Belcher falling in love over their shared appreciation of cannibalism makes it clear that, while it's a life sim, the game is really a joke-generating machine. Living the Dream on the Nintendo Switch gives you more tools and fewer restrictions to make those jokes stranger and funnier. But while Living the Dream provides more freedom for creativity, it also has big restrictions on sharing those creations, and the game seems content with inside jokes staying within its virtual walls.
Living the Dre …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新款朋友集合游戏是为共享而设计的——即使任天堂不希望你这样做
zh.summary: 任天堂新版《朋友集合游戏：梦想生活》扩展了创意工具以生成越来越荒诞的场景和笑话，但对创意分享施加了严格限制。这种矛盾反映了任天堂对用户生成内容的谨慎态度，尽管该公司为驱动游戏吸引力的创意提供了支持。

title: Microsoft faces fresh Windows Recall security concerns
summary: Microsoft's redesigned Windows Recall feature continues to face security vulnerabilities despite year-long efforts to secure it, with a new security tool demonstrating extractable data from the AI-powered screenshot system. The persistent concerns highlight ongoing challenges in balancing productivity features with user privacy protection.
content:
When Microsoft tried to launch Recall, an AI-powered Windows feature that screenshots most of what you do on your PC, it was labeled a "disaster" for cybersecurity and a "privacy nightmare." After the backlash and a year-long delay to redesign and secure Recall, it's once again facing security and privacy concerns.
Cybersecurity expert Alexander Hagenah has created TotalRecall Reloaded, a tool that extracts and displays data from Recall. It's an update to the TotalRecall tool that demonstrated all the weaknesses in the original Recall feature before Microsoft redesigned it.
Microsoft's redesign focused on creating a secure vault for Recall …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软面临Windows Recall的新安全隐忧
zh.summary: 微软重新设计的Windows Recall功能尽管经过一年多的安全加固努力，仍然面临安全漏洞，一款新的安全工具展示了从这个AI驱动的截图系统中可提取的数据。持续的安全顾虑突出了在平衡生产力功能与用户隐私保护之间的持续挑战。

title: Snap is laying off 16 percent of its staff as it leans into AI
summary: Snap is laying off 16 percent of its global workforce (approximately 1,000 employees) and closing 300 open positions as it pivots toward AI-driven profitability. CEO Evan Spiegel cited rapid AI advancements enabling teams to reduce repetitive work as justification, reflecting broader tech industry trends of using AI adoption to justify workforce restructuring.
content:
Snap is laying off roughly 16 percent of its global workforce in a cost-cutting effort to chase improved profitability with the help of AI. The cuts will impact around 1,000 full-time employees, according to a memo sent to staffers from Snap CEO Evan Spiegel. An additional 300 open roles are also being closed.
"While these changes are necessary to realize Snap's long-term potential, we believe that rapid advancements in artificial intelligence enable our teams to reduce repetitive work, increase velocity, and better support our community, partners, and advertisers," Spiegel wrote in the memo, which was included in the company's 8-K filing.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap裁减16%员工，全力投向AI
zh.summary: Snap正在裁减全球员工的16%（约1000名员工），并关闭300个招聘岗位，以转向由AI驱动的盈利能力。首席执行官埃文·斯皮格尔引用AI技术的快速进步使团队能够减少重复工作作为理由，反映了科技行业利用AI采用来证明劳动力重组的更广泛趋势。

title: Spotify now sells printed books
summary: Spotify is expanding into physical book retail through a partnership with Bookshop.org, launching on Android with iOS support next week. The integration strengthens Spotify's role as a multi-format platform for readers while supporting independent bookstores through the partnership.
content:
The Bookshop.org integration is now available for Spotify users on Android, with iOS support expected next week. | Image: Spotify	

Spotify is rolling out some new updates for book lovers, expanding audiobook listening features and allowing users to buy physical publications through the platform. Readers in the US and UK can now purchase printed books via a new integration with Bookshop.org on the Android Spotify app, with support for iOS users expected to arrive next week. 
The partnership was announced in February, with Bookshop.org founder and CEO Andy Hunter saying at the time that "Spotify is bringing in more readers, and I'm all for anything that grows the size of the pie." This, alongside other updates announced today, aim to make it easier to jump into your next …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify现在销售印刷书籍
zh.summary: Spotify通过与Bookshop.org的合作扩展到实体书零售，在Android上推出，下周将支持iOS。该整合强化了Spotify作为读者多格式平台的角色，同时通过该合作伙伴关系支持独立书店。

title: Grok’s sexual deepfakes almost got it banned from Apple’s App Store. Almost.
summary: Apple privately threatened to remove Elon Musk's AI app Grok from its App Store in January over inadequate moderation of nonconsensual sexual deepfakes, though ultimately did not follow through with removal. The behind-closed-doors threat highlights selective enforcement of Apple's platform policies and criticism of its reluctance to take stronger public action.
content:
Apple quietly threatened to kick Elon Musk's AI app, Grok, from its App Store in January over its failure to curb the surge of nonconsensual sexual deepfakes flooding X, according to NBC News. It was a muted show of force from one of tech's most powerful gatekeepers, made behind closed doors even as the undressing crisis unfolded in full public view and criticism over Apple's cowardice mounted.
In a letter obtained by NBC News, Apple told US senators it "contacted the teams behind both X and Grok after it received complaints and saw news coverage of the scandal" and demanded that the developers "create a plan to improve content moderation." …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Grok因性深度伪造险些被苹果下架
zh.summary: 苹果在1月份因Grok缺乏对非自愿性深度伪造的充分审核而私下威胁将埃隆·马斯克的AI应用程序Grok从App Store中删除，尽管最终并未执行删除。这一私下威胁突显了苹果平台政策的选择性执法，以及对其不愿采取更强有力的公开行动的批评。

title: Spotify launches the ability to purchase physical books in the US and UK
summary: Spotify is rolling out the ability to purchase physical books through Bookshop.org integration on Android, with iOS launching next week. The feature expands Spotify's book ecosystem beyond audiobooks and deepens user engagement across different content formats in US and UK markets.
content: Spotify users in the US and UK can officially purchase physical books through the Android app. iOS users will get the feature next week.

zh.title: Spotify在美国和英国推出购买实体书的功能
zh.summary: Spotify通过与Bookshop.org整合在安卓上推出购买实体书的功能，iOS版本将在下周推出。该功能扩展了Spotify的图书生态系统，超越有声读物，深化了用户在美国和英国市场对不同内容格式的参与度。

title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
summary: Anthropic's $380 billion valuation is attracting investor interest as some OpenAI investors reassess the rationale for OpenAI's recent funding round, which assumes a $1.2 trillion-plus IPO valuation. The comparison highlights shifting investor sentiment in the competitive AI market.
content: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.

zh.title: Anthropic的崛起让一些OpenAI投资者重新考虑
zh.summary: Anthropic的3800亿美元估值正在吸引投资者关注，一些OpenAI投资者正在重新评估OpenAI最近融资的合理性，该融资基于1.2万亿美元以上的IPO估值。这种对比突显了竞争激烈的AI市场中投资者情绪的变化。
